player_quotes.quote: In grad school, everyone is at a different place in life. Rugby was the one thing that brought us all together, and I've made some of my best friends in the world through this club. Hands down, the best decision I made at CBS.
player_quotes.name: Joe Mozden

player_quotes.quote: Being part of the rugby team means joining a community where everyone is welcomed, supported, and brought together regardless of background or experience. The most rewarding part is seeing that inclusiveness translate into a powerful team spirit that drives us to be better, together.
player_quotes.name: Heidi Liu

player_quotes.quote: A place where you find brothers who’ll go to war for you - and you’d do the same
player_quotes.name: Eisuke Miyamoto
